Metadata.title: MAX Digital — Premium websites that build trust
Metadata.description: A boutique web studio building premium websites that turn visitors into clients — designed and built personally by Max.

Hero.subtitle: I design and build premium websites that turn visitors into clients — without the generic template look.
trustPoints: Direct with me — no account managers

Trust.title: Anyone can make claims. Here's what's actually true.
Trust.description: Six points you can verify yourself — not six adjectives.

items.title: Direct line to me
items.description: No account managers, no hand-offs. Every message reaches me personally — I usually reply within one business day.

items.title: Full ownership at launch
items.description: Source code, design files and hosting access are all yours, completely. No lock-in, nothing held back.

items.title: Transparent pricing
items.description: Real starting prices, published right here — no sales call required just to get a ballpark.

items.title: Modern, maintainable tech
items.description: Next.js and React instead of a page builder — the same technical foundation leading tech companies run on.

items.title: Accessibility is standard
items.description: Sufficient contrast, keyboard support and clean HTML from day one — not an upsell, not an afterthought.

items.title: A fixed timeline before you commit
items.description: You'll know the scope and schedule before work begins — not a rough guess that grows later.

Services.title: Everything your website needs. Nothing it doesn't.
Services.description: A focused set of services — from first sketch to long after launch.

items.title: Business Websites
items.description: A professional website that represents your business credibly — from the homepage to the contact form.

items.title: Landing Pages
items.description: Focused pages built around a single action — perfect for campaigns, product launches, or offers.

items.title: Website Redesign
items.description: Is your website outdated or underperforming? I'll give it a modern, faster foundation.

items.title: Performance Optimization
items.description: Slow pages cost you customers. I make sure load times never drive people away.

items.title: SEO Fundamentals
items.description: The technical foundation that lets Google actually find and understand your site.

items.title: Maintenance & Care
items.description: Launch day isn't the finish line. I handle updates, small changes, and day-to-day upkeep.

Pricing.title: Straightforward pricing, no surprises
Pricing.description: Every project gets its own price — these are typical starting points so you know what to expect before we talk.
Pricing.foundingPriceNote: Founding price: for my first clients — the price goes up once I'm fully booked.

plans.name: Landing Page
plans.description: A focused page built around one clear goal — perfect if you want to be visible online quickly, without complexity.

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: A focused, professional site for businesses just getting their online presence right.

plans.name: Growth
plans.description: A complete site with the content tools and structure to grow with your business.

plans.name: Custom
plans.description: For e-commerce, web apps, or anything with requirements beyond a standard site.

Portfolio.title: A closer look at my work
Portfolio.description: Three projects that show how I approach design and structure — from this very site to fully worked-through concepts.

projects.name: MAX Digital
projects.summary: The very site you're on right now — its own case study.
projects.goal: Show potential clients in the first few seconds that this is careful, considered work — and turn visitors into intro calls.
projects.challenge: A one-person studio has to feel just as trustworthy as an established agency, without turning impersonal or generic.
projects.solution: A restrained, dark design with a single accent tone, a personal first-person voice throughout, and a preview mockup that shows the site referencing itself.
projects.technology: Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion

projects.name: Fantasy Universe
projects.summary: A platform for game masters to build their fantasy campaign worlds and share them with their group.
projects.goal: Give game masters one place where lore, maps and characters come together in a structured way.
projects.challenge: Huge amounts of lore and branching detail needed to stay searchable without constraining creativity or cluttering the interface.
projects.solution: A visual world map as the central entry point, linked to a modular wiki system, wrapped in a dark, atmospheric visual language.

projects.name: Tile Company
projects.summary: A digital catalog for a tile and natural stone supplier, built for architects, contractors and homeowners.
projects.goal: Make it fast to find the right material and easy to request a sample.
projects.challenge: A traditional trade business needed to feel premium and current online, without alienating its existing customer base.
projects.solution: A reduced catalog with large-format material presentation, filtering by color, format and finish, and a simple sample request instead of a full checkout.

Why.leadStatement: I started MAX Digital because I kept seeing good businesses undersold by bad websites.
paragraphs: Slow templates. Generic stock photos. Contact forms that look like an afterthought. A business can do everything right and still lose a customer's trust in the first three seconds on their site.

I care about the details most agencies skip — how a button feels when you hover it, how fast a page loads on a phone with bad signal, whether the copy actually says something real. That's the work, not the decoration around it.

When you work with me, you're not handed off to a junior after the pitch call. I'm involved from the first sketch to the last line of code, because that's the only way I know to keep the quality consistent.

pillars.title: Personal collaboration
pillars.description: You talk directly with the person building your site — from the first call to launch.

pillars.title: Individual solutions, not templates
pillars.description: No page builders, no drag-and-drop kits. Every site is designed and built specifically for your business.

pillars.title: Modern technologies
pillars.description: Built on the same technical foundation leading tech companies rely on.

pillars.title: Long-term thinking
pillars.description: Your site should still look and work great in three years — not just on launch day.

Process.title: A clear path from idea to launch
Process.description: No black boxes. You always know what's happening and what's next.

steps.title: Free intro call
steps.description: We talk about your business, your goals, and whether we're a good fit — no cost, no obligation.

steps.title: First prototype
steps.description: You get a real, visible first draft of your website — not a concept deck, not a buzzword pitch, but something you can actually look at and judge.

steps.title: Refinement
steps.description: The prototype becomes the finished site — in clear feedback rounds, for as long as it genuinely takes. No artificial countdown, no guessing.

steps.title: Launch
steps.description: Go-live happens once you're genuinely satisfied — with domain, hosting and analytics all set up correctly.

steps.title: Support
steps.description: I stay reachable after launch — for questions, small updates, or the occasional 'can we change this' request.

FAQ.title: Questions you might have
FAQ.description: If something isn't covered here, just ask — I usually reply within a day.

items.question: How long does a typical project take?
items.answer: The first prototype takes 5 days, max — that's a fixed promise, not an estimate. How long it takes to launch after that depends on scope and on you: we keep refining details until you're genuinely happy, instead of forcing a deadline that doesn't fit.

items.question: What do you need from me to get started?
items.answer: Just clarity on your goals and any existing brand assets you have. I'll guide you through the rest with a short discovery call and a simple questionnaire.

items.question: How many rounds of revisions do I get?
items.answer: Every project includes structured feedback rounds at both the design and development stages. In practice, most projects need far fewer revisions than expected, because we align on direction early.

items.question: Do I own the website after it's built?
items.answer: Yes, entirely. Source code, design files and hosting access are all handed over to you at launch. There's no lock-in and nothing held hostage.

items.question: What technology do you build with?
items.answer: Modern, production-grade code — typically Next.js and React — chosen for speed, reliability and long-term maintainability. No drag-and-drop page builders, no bloated plugins.

items.question: What happens after launch?
items.answer: I stay reachable for questions and small fixes. If you need ongoing updates, the Growth and Custom plans include support windows, or we can set up a simple monthly arrangement.

items.question: Do you work with businesses outside your local area?
items.answer: Yes — the entire process is designed to work remotely, over calls, email and a shared project board, regardless of where you're based.

Contact.title: Let's build something worth trusting.
Contact.description: Tell me a bit about your project. No obligation — if it's not a fit, I'll tell you honestly and point you in a better direction.
Contact.responseTime: Usually replies within one business day
Contact.noPressure: No sales pitch, no spam — just an honest answer.

form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: What are you looking to build?
form.successDescription: Thanks for reaching out — I'll get back to you within one business day.
form.error: Something went wrong — please email hello@maxdigital.studio directly.

Footer.description: A boutique web studio designing and building premium websites for businesses that want to be trusted, not just seen.

This page exists to satisfy German Telemedia Act (TMG) §5 disclosure requirements, which apply based on the business's jurisdiction regardless of a visitor's chosen language.

sections.heading: Responsible for content pursuant to § 18 (2) MStV
sections.body:
Max [Placeholder last name]
[Placeholder address as above]

sections.heading: EU Dispute Resolution
sections.body: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR): https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/. I am not obligated or willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

sections.heading: Liability for Content
sections.body: As a service provider, I am responsible for my own content on these pages in accordance with general law pursuant to § 7 (1) TMG. Under §§ 8 to 10 TMG, however, I am not obligated to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or investigate circumstances indicating unlawful activity.

sections.heading: Liability for Links
sections.body: This site contains links to external third-party websites over whose content I have no control. I therefore cannot accept any liability for this external content. The respective provider is always responsible for the content of linked pages.

sections.heading: Copyright
sections.body: Content and works created by me on these pages are subject to German copyright law. Third-party contributions are marked as such. Reproduction, editing, distribution, or any form of use beyond the scope of copyright law requires written consent.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.placeholderNotice: Note: this is a technically accurate baseline that describes exactly what data this website currently processes. It is not a substitute for legal review — please have it checked by a qualified professional before launch, especially once a hosting provider, analytics tools, or other processing is added.

sections.heading: Controller
sections.body:
Max [Placeholder last name]
[Placeholder address]
Email: hello@maxdigital.studio

sections.heading: Contact Form
sections.body: If you use the contact form, the data you provide (name, email address, project type, budget, message) is used exclusively to handle your inquiry and is not shared with third parties. The legal basis is Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (pre-contractual inquiry) or (f) (legitimate interest in communication).

sections.heading: Hosting
sections.body: [Placeholder: name and location of the hosting provider, once finalized — e.g. Vercel Inc. If hosting outside the EU/EEA, an additional note on the transfer basis (e.g. Standard Contractual Clauses) is required.]

sections.heading: Local Storage (Theme Preference)
sections.body: This site stores your light/dark mode preference in your browser's localStorage. This information never leaves your device, is never transmitted to a server, and is used only for display purposes. No tracking or marketing cookies are set.

sections.heading: Your Rights
sections.body: You have the right at any time to access, rectify, delete, or restrict the processing of your personal data, as well as a right to object to processing and a right to data portability. For questions, contact hello@maxdigital.studio. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority.
